name: BRISTOL MYERS SQUIBB CO
summary: Bristol Myers Squibb is a global biopharmaceutical company focused on discovering, developing, and delivering innovative medicines for serious diseases including cancer, cardiovascular conditions, immunology, and fibrosis. Key marketed products include Revlimid, Eliquis, Opdivo, Pomalyst, Orencia, Sprycel, Yervoy, Abraxane, and Empliciti. The company engages in extensive R&D, strategic alliances, licensing arrangements, and global manufacturing to bring therapies to patients worldwide.

products.name: Revlimid
products.description: Treatment for multiple myeloma and other hematological cancers.

products.name: Eliquis
products.description: Anticoagulant for stroke prevention and treatment of blood clots.

products.name: Opdivo
products.description: Immune checkpoint inhibitor for multiple oncology indications.

products.name: Pomalyst
products.description: Treatment for relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma.

products.name: Orencia
products.description: Biologic treatment for rheumatoid arthritis and psoriatic arthritis.

products.name: Sprycel
products.description: Targeted therapy for chronic myeloid leukemia.

products.name: Yervoy
products.description: Immunotherapy for melanoma and other cancers.

products.name: Abraxane
products.description: Chemotherapy for breast, lung, and pancreatic cancers.

products.name: Empliciti
products.description: Treatment for relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma.

partnerships.description: Co-development and commercialization alliance for Eliquis.
